name: Active Contracts Expiring in Next 10 Days — Email Summary (V2-UI captured via Pipeline A)
description: Captured from the V2 UI agent-creation flow via Pipeline A (`/api/v6/generate-ir-intent-contract`) on 2026-05-19, the same session as the WP-47 + WP-48 fixes. Reads a contracts spreadsheet, computes a date window (today + N days), filters to contracts expiring inside the window, sorts by due date, projects display columns, counts matches, then renders + sends an HTML summary email. Exercises a richer transform chain than `leads-qualified-stage4` (adds sort + reduce + a constants-only `with_fields` step that hits the WP-46 singleton path AND a date-range filter that hits the WP-45 date-aware comparison path). Third V2-UI + Pipeline A regression seed.

expected.phase_e_notes: End-to-end pass: 9/9 steps, real HTML email (1,221 chars in content.html_body) delivered to meiribarak@gmail.com. Sheet had 51 raw rows → 50 contract objects → 2 expiring within the 10-day window. 2,219 tokens (single AI call for email composition). Run via Mode B: --use-db-dsl. Requires agent_configurations.input_values populated with: spreadsheet_id, range, expiration_window_days, email_subject, recipient_email. **First agent in the regression suite that was saved via the refactored /api/create-agent endpoint (WP-48 — AgentRepository + getUser + Zod + Pino + supabaseServer + explicit timestamps)**. Verified: created_at === updated_at exactly (delta 0ms) on the agent row.

exercises: WP-45: ConditionalEvaluator gte/lte date-aware comparison on step4 (`item."Contract Ends Due Date" gte date_window.window_start && lte date_window.window_end`)
WP-46: transform/with_fields with constants-only expressions (step3 — `date_window = {window_start, window_end}` singleton)
WP-47: V2 UI pre-populates resolvedInputs from ir.config_defaults (no re-prompting)
WP-48: agent saved via AgentRepository with explicit created_at + updated_at + Zod validation + getUser auth + supabaseServer per SUPABASE_CLIENTS.md + Pino structured logging
transform chain shape: read → rows_to_objects → with_fields → filter → sort → map → reduce → ai_processing → send_email (richer than gantt/leads)
ai_processing/generate for HTML email composition (single AI call, no per-item AI)
Multi-recipient send_email with array-shape recipients.to (WP-42 path validated)
